pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly creates the volume at this path.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly checks for the script at this path.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which explicitly extract and verify hashes for the first and last 131,072 bytes.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly invokes veracrypt with --size=20M.

privileged_info_summary: The target VeraCrypt volume is synthetically generated at /home/ga/Volumes/investigation_data.hc with a size of 20 MB. The expected cryptographic erasure bash script is /home/ga/Documents/panic_wipe.sh. The primary and backup header sizes are exactly 131,072 bytes (128 KB) each, corresponding to the VeraCrypt volume header specifications.
